member.name: T:JG.EventKit.IEventBus
member.summary: Publishes events to registered handlers within the current process.

remarks.para: Inject this interface into any service that needs to raise events. Events are dispatched to handlers in priority order, filtered by any registered predicates, and processed according to the configured .
All implementations are thread-safe and support concurrent publish calls from multiple threads.

member.name: M:JG.EventKit.IEventBus.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes an event to all registered handlers for .
member.typeparam: The event type. Must be a non-null reference or value type.
member.param: Token to cancel the publish operation.
member.returns: A that completes when all handlers have finished.
member.exception: One or more handlers threw exceptions and the error policy is .

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.IEventHandler`1
member.summary: Handles events of type .
member.typeparam: The event type this handler processes.
member.remarks: Implementations are resolved from the DI container for each publish operation. Handler lifetime (transient, scoped, singleton) is determined by the service registration.

member.name: M:JG.EventKit.IEventHandler`1.HandleAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the published event.
member.param: Token to cancel the handling operation.
member.returns: A that completes when handling is finished.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.EventDispatchDelegate
member.summary: Delegate representing the next step in the event dispatch pipeline.
member.returns: A that completes when the remaining pipeline has finished.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.IEventMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that wraps event dispatch for cross-cutting concerns such as logging, timing, error handling, or retry logic.
member.remarks: Middleware executes in registration order. Each middleware must call the next delegate to continue the pipeline, or skip it to short-circuit dispatch. Implementations are registered as singletons and must be thread-safe.

member.name: M:JG.EventKit.IEventMiddleware.InvokeAsync``1(``0,JG.EventKit.EventDispatchDelegate,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invoked for each event passing through the dispatch pipeline.
member.param: Delegate to invoke the next middleware or the final handler dispatch.
member.returns: A that completes when this middleware step is finished.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.DeadLetterEvent
member.summary: Wraps an event that was published but had no matching handlers. Delivered to the callback when configured.

member.name: M:JG.EventKit.DeadLetterEvent.#ctor(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.DeadLetterEvent.Event
member.summary: The original event instance that had no handlers.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.DeadLetterEvent.EventType
member.summary: The runtime type of the published event.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.DeadLetterEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the dead letter was created.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.EventErrorPolicy
member.summary: Controls how the event bus handles handler exceptions during dispatch.

member.name: F:JG.EventKit.EventErrorPolicy.StopOnFirst
member.summary: Stop dispatching immediately when the first handler throws. The exception propagates to the publisher.

member.name: F:JG.EventKit.EventErrorPolicy.LogAndContinue
member.summary: Log the exception and continue dispatching to remaining handlers. No exception propagates to the publisher.

member.name: F:JG.EventKit.EventErrorPolicy.Aggregate
member.summary: Execute all handlers and collect exceptions. If any handlers fail, throw an containing all failures.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.EventKitOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the event bus.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventKitOptions.OnError
member.summary: Gets or sets the error handling policy for handler exceptions. Defaults to .

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventKitOptions.MaxParallelHandlers
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of handlers that execute in parallel per publish. A value of 1 (the default) means sequential dispatch in priority order. Values greater than 1 enable parallel dispatch with the specified concurrency limit.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventKitOptions.DeadLetterHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets a callback invoked when an event is published but no handlers match. When null (the default), unhandled events are silently ignored.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription
member.summary: Describes a handler registration for a specific event type, including execution priority and an optional filter predicate.

member.name: M:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription.#ctor(System.Type,System.Type,System.Int32,System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription.EventType
member.summary: The event type this subscription targets.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription.HandlerType
member.summary: The handler implementation type resolved from the DI container.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription.Priority
member.summary: Execution priority. Lower values execute first. Handlers with equal priority execute in registration order.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription.HasFilter
member.summary: Returns true if this subscription includes a filter predicate that can skip handler invocation for non-matching events.

member.name: P:JG.EventKit.EventSubscription.Filter
member.summary: The filter predicate, or null if no filter is configured.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.Internal.EventBus
member.summary: Default event bus implementation. Resolves handlers from DI, applies middleware, and dispatches events according to the configured error policy.
member.remarks: This type is registered as a singleton. It creates a new per publish call to support scoped handler lifetimes.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.Internal.EventHandlerRegistry
member.summary: Maintains a pre-sorted, cached lookup of handler subscriptions keyed by event type. Thread-safe for concurrent reads after construction.

member.name: M:JG.EventKit.Internal.EventHandlerRegistry.GetSubscriptions(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the priority-sorted subscriptions for , or an empty array if no handlers are registered.

member.name: T:JG.EventKit.Internal.LogMessages
member.summary: High-performance log messages using source-generated LoggerMessage delegates.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EventKitServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering EventKit services in a .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EventKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEventKit(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{JG.EventKit.EventKitOptions})
member.summary: Adds the EventKit event bus and its dependencies to the service collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EventKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEventHandler``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Int32,System.Func{``0,System.Boolean},Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLifetime)
member.summary: Registers an event handler for .
member.param: Execution priority. Lower values execute first. Defaults to 0.
Optional predicate to filter events before handler invocation. When provided, the handler is only invoked if the predicate returns true.
The DI lifetime for the handler. Defaults to .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.EventKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEventMiddleware``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers an event middleware that wraps all event dispatch. Middleware executes in registration order.
